Review 2 Contacts and resources Safer recruitment and DBS Diocesan Safeguarding Advisory Panel Reports and newsletters Safeguarding Audit Southwark Vision Welcome to the Diocese of Southwark, where we seek to be Christ Centred Outward Focused in all we do. Who we are In this section Who we are Southwark Vision Comings and Goings Diocesan leadership Croydon Episcopal Area Kingston Episcopal Area Woolwich Episcopal Area Governance and Synods Diocesan Synod Papers Elections General Synod Elections Annual Reports Deaneries Lay leadership Racial Justice Committee Schools Cathedral Diocesan staff Vacancies Brief history of the Diocese Who we are In this section Who we are Southwark Vision Comings and Goings Diocesan leadership Croydon Episcopal Area Kingston Episcopal Area Woolwich Episcopal Area Governance and Synods Diocesan Synod Papers Elections General Synod Elections Annual Reports Deaneries Lay leadership Racial Justice Committee Schools Cathedral Diocesan staff Vacancies Brief history of the Diocese Southwark is a diverse and vibrant Diocese in so many ways, from the energy of the inner city to the beauty of the Surrey Hills. We are one of the largest Dioceses in the Church of England, serving the people of South London and East Surrey. We take joy in the distinctiveness and variety of God’s gifts and people. You will find churches that offer welcome, care and dignity in Christ’s name to their parishes; chaplains walking along side those in education, hospitals, and prison; and pioneering communities seeking to reach out and serve in new ways. Our vision is founded on mutual commitment, speaking well of one another and walking together in the pilgrimage of faith. Supporting, encouraging, and resourcing each other in our common task, we seek to be a Diocese that is Christ centred and outward focused. Southwark Vision 2024-2035 is Christ Centred, Outward Focused. This next evolution of our vision comes as we continue to walk together, discerning God’s wisdom and guidance in our shared pilgrimage of faith. Keeping Christ as our centre and the focus of unity, we will continue to turn outwards – seeking to support, encourage, resource and learn from one another as we serve our parishes and God’s world

Mission Department exists to serve the parishes of the Diocese of Southwark, supporting local churches to thrive in all areas of Christian mission. This is a brief overview of some of what we do and how we can help you. Do contact the team for more information and advice.
